g.aria-label:
Simple and Intuitive JavaScript module exports are automatically registered and available in Excel.
Emphasis on Impactful Application Logic Spreadsheet UIs (UI ≈ state) emphasise core application logic over possibly auxiliary UI logic.
Hardened Security (Configurable) External network requests are disabled and file access is restricted to reduce security risks.

Webcellar is an open source Office Add-In for Microsoft Excel that lets developers easily enhance spreadsheets with custom JavaScript and TypeScript.
In practice, this simplifies the development of many advanced Excel applications, such as forecasting, risk, simulation, decision and artificial intelligence (AI) models.
As an end result, developers can deliver meaningful outcomes faster while preserving a familiar user interface and experience.
